title: Deploy and run real-world Semantic Reinforcement Memory reports
description: Deploy updated prototype stack with dual vector stores (OpenSearch + S3 Vectors) and execute real-world report runs with runtime on S3 Vectors. Record report IDs and outcomes in kbs comments.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Starting Task 3. Deploy succeeded with new S3 vectors outputs and OpenSearch teardown in cleanup. Beginning full real-world report sweep with S3 vector env vars.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Full sweep started. Scorecard 1461 run launched with report_id=b13cf97d-eb99-4ec4-98d0-6cb7b862e2f3 and task_id=42fa05c2-48ab-48bd-8df8-d7f619f4c429 using S3 vector env vars.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: First live run surfaced S3 health-check validation error; patched client and preparing rerun of real-world reports with same S3 vector env vars.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Rerunning full sweep after S3 client fix. Restarted at scorecard 1461 with S3 vector env vars to verify end-to-end indexing/clustering behavior.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Rerun passed prior failure point: first scorecard indexed 493 documents into S3 Vectors and advanced through clustering across scores (no S3 health-check validation error).

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Post-fix validation success: scorecard 1461 completed end-to-end with status ok. report_id=d60f2f2f-076a-4477-888a-af438a44a75e task_id=3054fb47-66e5-4650-ad88-4d81253edfbc. Output includes indexed docs and clustered topics.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Stack status is now UPDATE_COMPLETE in us-west-2. Validation sweep has confirmed successful end-to-end runs for scorecards 1461 (report d60f2f2f-076a-4477-888a-af438a44a75e) and 1481 (report cccd9ddf-5231-4f21-91ca-4a1f7f7bcec2).

comments.text: Realtime update: dual-store stack deployment completed successfully (UPDATE_COMPLETE). Starting targeted post-deploy real-world report validation run now with runtime pointed at S3 vectors.
